calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-03-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alexander Kushner in Propria Persona.

Mr. Kushner provided a copy of the IRA beneficiary summary and stated that the Bank of America accounts and the E-Trade account do not have a beneficiary set up. The Petition for Spousal Property was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Stewart. (Not Reported)
